title: duidaea marahuacensis
intro: Duidaea marahuacensis, also known as the Marahuacensis plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is native to the tropical forests of the Amazon region and has been used by the local communities for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues, due to its high concentration of flavonoids and terpenoids. Duidaea marahuacensis can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
